name: Extract NDA terms and generate compliance checklist in Iteration Layer

parameters.content:
## Extract NDA Terms and Generate a Compliance Checklist

Legal agencies managing NDAs across multiple clients use this pipeline to extract key confidentiality terms and generate standardized compliance checklists.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes on self-hosted n8n, or add it directly on n8n Cloud with Verified Community Nodes enabled.

### Step 1: Extract NDA Terms
Resource: **Document Extraction**

Configure the Document Extraction parameters below, then connect your credentials.

### Step 2: Generate Checklist
Resource: **Sheet Generation**

Configure the Sheet Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.schemaJson: {"fields":[{"name":"disclosing_party","type":"TEXT","description":"Disclosing party"},{"name":"receiving_party","type":"TEXT","description":"Receiving party"},{"name":"effective_date","type":"DATE","description":"NDA effective date"},{"name":"confidentiality_duration","type":"TEXT","description":"Duration of obligations"},{"name":"scope_of_confidential_info","type":"TEXTAREA","description":"Scope of confidential information"},{"name":"permitted_disclosures","type":"TEXTAREA","description":"Permitted disclosures"},{"name":"return_of_materials","type":"TEXTAREA","description":"Return of materials"},{"name":"non_solicitation","type":"BOOLEAN","description":"Non-solicitation clause"},{"name":"governing_law","type":"TEXT","description":"Governing law"},{"name":"breach_remedies","type":"TEXTAREA","description":"Breach remedies"}]}

parameters.sheetsJson: [{"name":"NDA Compliance Checklist","columns":[{"name":"Obligation","width":35},{"name":"Details","width":50},{"name":"Status","width":15},{"name":"Due Date","width":15},{"name":"Notes","width":30}],"rows":[[{"value":"Confidentiality scope acknowledged"},{"value":"{{ $json.scope_of_confidential_info }}"},{"value":"Pending"},{"value":""},{"value":"Brief team"}],[{"value":"Permitted disclosures documented"},{"value":"{{ $json.permitted_disclosures }}"},{"value":"Pending"},{"value":""},{"value":""}],[{"value":"Confidentiality end date tracked"},{"value":"{{ $json.confidentiality_duration }}"},{"value":"Pending"},{"value":""},{"value":"Set calendar reminder"}],[{"value":"Return of materials process"},{"value":"{{ $json.return_of_materials }}"},{"value":"Pending"},{"value":""},{"value":"At termination"}]]}]
